name: io.github.codespar/mcp-rapyd
description: MCP server for Rapyd — global collect + disburse across 100+ countries, including cash pickup and managed wallets

environmentVariables.name: RAPYD_ACCESS_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Rapyd access key (sent in the access_key header)

environmentVariables.name: RAPYD_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Rapyd secret key used to sign HMAC-SHA256 requests (never transmitted)

environmentVariables.name: RAPYD_ENV
environmentVariables.description: Rapyd environment: 'sandbox' (https://sandboxapi.rapyd.net) or 'production' (https://api.rapyd.net). Defaults to sandbox.
